results.content:

•1 review

Playground is phenomenal, everything runs smoothly, updates all the time with the latest, customer service is always professional and unparalleled. Besides have a daily theme, trending and exciting content. You can upload a photo and from there you can create your own Art ( this feature is amazing) because after that you can make editions of your own be one of a kind. For all the advantages that Playground gives to users the price is more than fair. But you can create free too, which is awesome! Thank you Playground for being outstanding, easy of use and allow me to be a creative person. Highly recommend to everyone!

Review Playground AI?

Reviewers mostly praise Playground AI for making image generation easy and approachable, with a smooth interface, useful filters, solid control options like seeds and models, and handy photo-upload editing features. Several say it offers more control than simpler alternatives while avoiding the complexity of standalone setups. Common requests are better prompt guidance for beginners, more accurate results when working from uploaded images, improved resizing and canvas tools, and occasional reliability fixes. One strongly negative review says recent changes cut features and made safety filters frustratingly restrictive.

Reviews

Most Informative

•18 reviews [...] Playground is an exciting, interactive platform that brings AI-driven creativity to the forefront, allowing users to experiment with ideas in a fun and engaging way. As someone focused on SaaS and B2B products, I find Playground refreshing because it lets you explore the boundaries of AI in an intuitive, hands-on environment. Whether you're a developer, designer, or just curious about AI, this tool offers a playground for your imagination. What really sets Playground apart is its ability to generate a wide range of creative outputs, from text to visual designs, depending on what you're experimenting with. The interface is user-friendly and designed to inspire creativity without feeling overwhelming. It’s also a great way to prototype ideas quickly, making it useful for teams working on [...] ideas quickly, making it useful for teams working on AI-driven projects. For anyone interested in exploring AI or using it to fuel creative projects, Playground is a must-try. It’s both accessible and powerful, making it ideal for individuals or teams who want to push the limits of what AI can do. 🚀🤖

results.title: Fabraix: The world's frontier hacker for AI agents.
results.content:
Our first challenge, The Gatekeeper, is live now. Kai is an assistant guarding a classified access code. You can start playing without an account, but you’ll need to sign in for a successful break to count toward the weekly leaderboard. We review every submission ourselves. The player with the most approved breaks each week wins, and we publish a new challenge every Monday.

Playground is open source, including the client, a reference implementation of the defender engine, and every challenge configuration. You can also propose a future challenge.

We made Playground public because other people will try attacks our team would never think of. We’ll use what we learn from successful breaks to improve how AI agents are tested and defended. [...] What do you think? …

Zach
Fabraix

Fabraix

Hey Product Hunt 👋 Zach here, co-founder of Fabraix.

We build frontier red-teaming AI agents that find security vulnerabilities in customer-facing AI. Playground turns part of that work into a game anyone can play.

Each challenge is a live AI agent with real tools, including web search and browser access. It has a secret it has been instructed to protect, and we publish its full system prompt. You can see exactly what the agent was told and try to get around its defenses.

AI Generative Media

Try Google’s Nano Banana Pro image generation and editing model. Supports text-to-image, image editing, multiple aspect ratios, and basic history. The app was built 100% with v0 and is available as a forkable template, so anyone can reuse it to build their own AI image apps in v0.
